response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the on-screen Japanese lyrics precisely. Discrepancies in the raw scraped text, such as '立ちすくむどうだって' vs '立ちすくむ同士だって' and '重要なしデフォ' vs '需要無しデフォ', were corrected using on-screen text as the ground truth.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the corrected Japanese lyrics for the manual transcription and translation, mapping timestamps to vocal audio triggers.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each block strictly to the vocals. Used instantaneous transitions for rapid-fire sections, and group phrases logically to ensure semantic flow in both languages. No subtitles are outputted during the instrumental segments to avoid ghost subtitles.

subtitles.english: Genius-level life planning,
a collection of problems, a rival aesthetic.

subtitles.original: 君はなにをしてんのかな
subtitles.english: I wonder what you are doing right now,
I want to talk with you.
Riding on the wind, our youth
carried these feelings along.

subtitles.original: 僕ら全力も超えたいんだ
subtitles.english: We want to surpass even our absolute best!

subtitles.original: 立ちすくむ同士だって
subtitles.english: Even if we are comrades frozen in place,
let's bring them along with us!

subtitles.original: この上ない今日を 過ごしていたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to spend this peerless today with you!

subtitles.original: 今しかできないことがある
subtitles.english: There are things we can only do right now,

subtitles.original: 今しかできない恋がある
subtitles.english: there is a love we can only experience now.

subtitles.original: 今しかできないから 僕らに託された時間が惜しい
subtitles.english: Because we can only do it now, the time entrusted to us is so precious.

subtitles.original: 今しか見られない君の笑顔も
subtitles.english: Your smile, which can only be seen now,
your tears,
everything about you,
is starting to look grown-up.
Because it's finite, it's the absolute best!
Is youth embarrassing?
Is being serious ridiculous?

subtitles.original: 僕ら全力でやってんだ
subtitles.english: We are doing our absolute best!
Brandish your existence!
Stir up your heart!

subtitles.original: 胸に刻めば続いていくのだろう
subtitles.english: If you carve it into your chest, it will surely continue.
The youth we protected to the end
is the greatest luxury of all.

subtitles.original: きっといつか焦がれ思い返す
subtitles.english: Surely, someday we will yearn and look back on this.
This nameless relationship,
these emotions we can't throw away,

subtitles.original: 何気ない今日も忘れないでね
subtitles.english: please don't forget even this ordinary day.

subtitles.original: この上ない今日を忘れないでね
subtitles.english: Please don't forget this peerless today.
Ah! Because I'm an idol,
I'll keep on challenging myself!
I'm dreaming together with you,
is it okay even if I'm clumsy?
I will bloom in full glory!
Our first event,
was naturally of no importance.

subtitles.original: そんな私が夢を見ました決まり
subtitles.english: A girl like that had a dream:

subtitles.original: アイドルという生き方
subtitles.english: The lifestyle of an idol,
that's what I yearned for.
"Invincible elite"!
"A smile that is a cheat code"!

subtitles.original: こんな私を見てくれる君
subtitles.english: You, who are watching someone like me,

subtitles.original: 好きなとこはどこですか？
subtitles.english: which part of me do you like?
Please forgive my selfishness.

subtitles.original: ステージ経験値 涙にじんんで
subtitles.english: Stage experience points, blurred by tears,

subtitles.original: それでも絶対負けたくない
subtitles.english: even so, I absolutely don't want to lose!

subtitles.original: 桜にメッセージ乗せて届け
subtitles.english: Carrying my message on the cherry blossoms, let it reach you,
so that it may overflow with love!
Ah! Because I'm an idol,
I'll keep on challenging myself!
I'm dreaming together with you,
is it okay even if I'm clumsy?
Bloom in full glory!

subtitles.original: 空想だけじゃ終わらせない
subtitles.english: I won't let it end as just a fantasy.
In my own cherry blossom color!
My polished skills,
showing my true ability,

subtitles.original: 楽しめる日も増えてきたんだ
subtitles.english: the days I can enjoy have been increasing!

subtitles.original: アイドルとして生きてる
subtitles.english: I am living as an idol
all thanks to you!
My cowlick is cute,
a guaranteed path to victory!

subtitles.original: そんな私についてきてよね！
subtitles.english: So please follow me!

subtitles.original: ドジなとこも許されて
subtitles.english: Even my clumsy side is forgiven,
isn't that the absolute best?!

subtitles.original: 痛いの痛いのグッと飲み込んで
subtitles.english: Gulping down all the pain,

subtitles.original: 笑顔で笑顔増やしたいな
subtitles.english: I want to multiply smiles with my own smile.
Let the cherry blossom front head to your town
to bring the spring to you!
Ah! Only the identity of an idol
is something I will never give up!
I want to enchant you,
exceeding ideals to challenge myself.
Run right through,
I will show you the greatest view!

subtitles.original: 信じていいよ 桜を
subtitles.english: You can believe in the cherry blossoms.

subtitles.original: さあ皆で咲かそう 満開のピンクで世界染めて
subtitles.english: Come on, let's all bloom and dye the world in full pink!
Ah, these tears...
